title: 大阪杯の後に・遠くなった背中

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Winning Ticket lost to Narita Taishin...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Especially Taishin... Her running was amazing...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
choice_data_list: Good job! You almost had it.
Good job! You almost had it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Heheh... I guess first place wasn't in the cards.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But to be honest, I'm kinda surprised I managed
to rank as high as I did. Everyone was so strong...
Phew...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah... but Taishin's energy today was, like, wow... It was really, really intense...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It makes me wanna work harder!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you pick my next race yet? We gotta
make it a big one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is exhausted, but she performed
well in this race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So for our next challenge, I think we should aim
for the big race that tops off the first half of the
Twinkle Series year...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! A Grand Prix race! I bet a lot of BIG
competitors will show up there!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What if Taishin and Hayahide enter too, and it
becomes a super hot match like the Derby?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All the cheers! All the smiles! Just thinking about it makes me wanna... cryyyy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna go full blast for the
Takarazuka Kinen!
